channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Grandmother's closet inspires young actress
item.description: ABC News' Danny New speaks with a young woman who went viral performing in outfits from her grandmother's closet.

item.title: WATCH: Real-life Spider-Man helps man cross busy intersection
item.description: A driver dressed as Spider-Man helped a man in a wheelchair cross a busy intersection in Jonesboro, Arkansas.

item.title: Head of euthanasia firm dies while climbing Mount Fuji
item.description: A Swiss man died after losing consciousness while hiking Mount Fuji, marking the second fatality on the iconic mountain in one week.

item.title: Wildfire forces 40,000 tourists and residents to flee French peninsula
item.description: Several firefighters have died as France, Spain and Italy battle wildfires that have forced tens of thousands to evacuate a vacation hotspot.
